name: vmware-global-monitoring-portal
description: Unified monitoring portal/dashboard for VMware vCenter infrastructure across global data centers

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,WEB -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.verify: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix web run build
